overview: A game-like home inventory management app where users type item names to auto-find matching emojis, then drag and drop them into interactive room grids. Manage multiple rooms like Living Room, Bedroom, Kitchen, and Bathroom with a bright, playful interface.
features: Type item name to auto-find matching emoji/icon
Drag and drop items into room grid layouts
4 default rooms: Living Room, Bedroom, Kitchen, Bathroom
Bright colorful game-like UI with room-specific themes
